title: Khorurt khorin
notes: PDF sheet 55 corresponds to printed score page 1 based on pdftotext inspection. Full range inferred from table of contents where the next section begins on score page 9. Audiveris exported sheets 55-62 on 2026-05-17; the raw organ MIDI completed playback through FANTOM-6 7 8 MIDI OUT 1. Output still requires manual correction before service use.

title: Hays hark
notes: Range inferred from table of contents: Hays hark starts on score page 9 and Barekhosutyamp starts on score page 15. Audiveris exported sheets 63-68 on 2026-05-17; output is raw OMR and requires manual correction before service use.

title: Barekhosutyamp
notes: Range inferred from table of contents and score-page text: Barekhosutyamp starts on score page 15, and the visible Aysor zhoghovyal cue appears on score page 22. Audiveris split this range into multiple internal scores and exported an .mvtnull.mxl file; output is raw OMR and requires careful manual correction before service use.

title: Aysor zhoghovyal
notes: Range inferred from visible score text: Aysor zhoghovyal cue appears on score page 22, and the section appears to continue through score page 28. Audiveris created ten internal scores, logged PartCollation warnings and a NullPointerException during export, and produced only 14.0 seconds / 87 note-on events for this seven-page range. Treat as failed/high-risk raw OMR, not a usable transcription.
